build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(62, 62, 25)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(15).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=25).rect(40, 40).extrude(5)

STEP 4: Create bolt circle — .workplane(centered=True).circle(26).extrude(2)

STEP 5: Add bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-18, -18).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
    .moveTo(18, -18).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
    .moveTo(-18, 18).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
    .moveTo(18, 18).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()

STEP 6: Add additional raised features for bolt retention — .workplane(offset=20).rect(30, 30).extrude(3)

This recipe creates a bearing housing with the specified dimensions and features using CadQuery operations.
